overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from a historical discovery tour mode, showing a player walking along a coastal cliffside path toward the Altar of Aphrodite. The scene features classical ancient Greek architecture with stone columns, marble statues, ceremonial fires, and transitions from an outdoor columned pathway into the temple's inner courtyard during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with classical statues and cypress trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal dirt path toward the columned ceremonial walkway

entered.detail: marble statue of a robed female figure on a pedestal surrounded by flowers
tall narrow evergreen tree silhouetted against the sky
tall narrow evergreen tree framing the right side of the path
large terracotta pots with purple and pink flowering plants
expansive view of the ocean with distant islands and golden sunlight reflection
ceremonial pathway lined with stone columns and hanging purple banners leading to temple

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a coastal cliffside during golden hour, featuring a marble statue of Aphrodite surrounded by flowers. The camera moves forward along a dirt path lined with tall cypress trees, approaching a columned ceremonial pathway that leads toward a distant temple structure overlooking the sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: columned ceremonial pathway with hanging purple banners

events.description: entering the columned pathway with stone pillars and purple hanging banners

agents.ego_description: walking under the stone columns and purple banners toward the temple structure

entered.detail: tall classical stone columns supporting the banner structure
dark purple fabric banners hanging between the stone columns
decorative stone bases with urns and offerings
burning ceremonial fire in a stone bowl
tree with pink blossoms lining the pathway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a columned ceremonial pathway where purple banners hang between classical stone pillars. The sea view shifts to the left as the path curves, revealing side shrines with burning ceremonial fires and pink flowering trees lining the approach to the main temple.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor shrine with marble statue and ceremonial offerings

events.description: turning left off the main path to approach the side shrine with the marble statue
sun moves behind the marble statue creating a strong backlit silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: turning off the main path to examine the shrine with offerings, burning fire, and marble statue

entered.detail: marble statue of Aphrodite backlit by the setting sun with one hand raised to head
burning fire pit with flames in a bronze bowl
stone table with scrolls, grapes, and ceremonial cloth

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to explore a side shrine featuring a backlit marble statue of Aphrodite. A ceremonial fire burns in a bronze bowl before an offering table displaying scrolls and grapes. The camera circles the shrine, examining the details of the offerings and the statue silhouetted against the golden hour sun before returning to the main path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek temple entrance and inner sanctuary courtyard

events.description: approaching the temple entrance triggers UI text 'Altar of Aphrodite' and historical information panel
passing through the temple doorway into the inner courtyard with flanking statues

agents.ego_description: ascending the temple steps and passing through the doorway into the inner sanctuary

entered.detail: large stone temple with pediment, columns, and decorative garlands around the entrance
tall entrance with lattice stone screens and wooden doors open to the interior
open courtyard visible through the doorway with stone paving and distant mountains
pair of marble statues framing the courtyard entrance
trees with pink blossoms lining the inner courtyard
vertical beam of purple light indicating an objective or point of interest

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Altar of Aphrodite temple, ascending the stone steps as a UI panel identifies the historical location. The camera passes through the ornate doorway with lattice screens into the inner courtyard, revealing flanking marble statues, pink flowering trees, and a mysterious purple beam of light at the far end of the sanctuary.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that transitions from an open natural path into the ornate inner sanctuary of a temple. It begins by passing a marble statue of Aphrodite and moving along a dirt path lined with cypress trees toward a columned ceremonial walkway overlooking the sea. As the path curves, the view shifts to reveal purple banners hanging between stone pillars and side shrines with burning ceremonial fires and pink flowering trees. The camera then turns left to circle a backlit statue of Aphrodite and an offering table of scrolls and grapes before returning to the main approach. Finally, the movement ascends stone steps and passes through an ornate doorway with lattice screens, entering an inner courtyard where marble statues flank a mysterious purple beam of light.
